top_insights: Nobody is coming to save you, and that is the best news.
Formal education teaches compliance; self-teaching builds empires.
True wealth isn't a number, it's the freedom to ignore noise.
The economy runs on smart people selling dreams to the insecure.
Never air your partner's dirty laundry; private respect beats public clout.
hook_patterns: Contrarian assertions challenging popular consensus or norms
Insightful revelations framed as 'hard truths' or counter-intuitive facts
Personal anecdotes used to validate broader societal observations
emotional_drivers: Validation of the audience's skepticism or hidden beliefs
Relief from the pressure of needing to have an opinion on everything
Empowerment through the realization of self-sufficiency
emerging_narrative: A cultural shift toward radical self-reliance and skepticism of established institutions, where audiences resonate most with content that exposes the 'real' mechanics of success, wealth, and society while validating their own intuition over mainstream narratives.

viral_examples.author: Codie_Sanchez
viral_examples.text: I have a friend who used to work for 2 billionaires after all he's seen he said to me, "I wish you not one penny over $299 million. Reality gets completely lost somewhere after that." I think about that sometimes.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Elon’s stance is principled. Trump’s stance is practical. Tech needs Republicans for the present. Republicans need Tech for the future. Drop the tax cuts, cut some pork, get the bill through.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: The smartest people are all self-taught, even if they went to school.

viral_examples.author: ShaanVP
viral_examples.text: Turns out the greatest startup idea of the last 10 years was a chatbot where you ask a question and it answers with something a guy wrote on Reddit 8 years ago unusual_whales @unusual_whales Oct 7, 2025 ChatGPT has hit 800 million weekly active users.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.

winning_patterns: Contrarian assertions challenging popular consensus or norms
Insightful revelations framed as 'hard truths' or counter-intuitive facts
Personal anecdotes used to validate broader societal observations
avoid_recent_hooks: If you understand this, you win:
Stop believing that motivation is the prerequisite for action.
The real problem isn't that you lack a unique idea.
The real problem isn't effort in wealth and leverage
The real problem isn't that you're too busy. It's that you haven't learned how to do nothing.

top_insights: The elite don't save you; they optimize you out of the equation.
Degrees prove compliance; self-taught skills prove you can actually build.
Stop waiting for a savior. The rescue you need is a reset.
Mainstream optimism is a trap designed to keep you compliant and poor.
True power isn't having an opinion; it's knowing when to stay silent.
hook_patterns: Contrarian statements challenging common beliefs or norms
Insight-driven reveals of hidden truths or industry mechanics
Personal anecdotes establishing unique authority or exclusive access
emotional_drivers: Validation of the audience's skepticism or alternative views
Desire for status signaling and understanding power structures
Relief from the pressure of needing external approval or rescue
emerging_narrative: A cultural shift toward radical self-reliance and skepticism of institutional authority, where audiences resonate with 'insider' truths that debunk mainstream optimism and emphasize that success comes from individual agency rather than waiting for rescue.
